title: AntiAdminAbuse Moderation
description: Is the admin abusing their power in your vanilla server? Tell them to download this.
body:
![Panel2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8723736b72380b4de5fc46a0b9431c0f39467639.png) **AntiAdminAbuse Moderation :** Version: 3.0 [ Complete Re-work ] ## EXTERNAL LINK : ───────────────────────────────────────────── - [ + ] [Official Documentation](https://www.notion.so/aaamoderation/ANTIADMINABUSE-MODERATION-2be4df3e49ea80849a2ee013456e0157?source=copy_link) - [ + ] [My Discord](https://discord.gg/szdSrmZMrB) - [ + ] [Github](https://www.github.com/jaiired-gh) ───────────────────────────────────────────── - ( Video cooming soon ) ## INTRODUCTION : **AntiAdminAbuse** is a moderation plugin for both vanilla and larger servers. > The main purpose of the plugin is to publicly display all players who do not have an administrative role, to have greater control over the display of commands executed by an operator. The plugin does not contain any backdoors or hidden codes to give illegal and, to say the least, legal advantages. In fact, the plugin aims to keep vanilla servers alive, since most of them end up being abused by an operator/administrator.
AAAModeration simply wants to keep servers alive and, above all, promote greater respect for one another, preventing operators from abusing their power and thus imposing this limitation on themselves. > **Important note**: If you need more information about the plugin, an external link to the official documentation is available. ───────────────────────────────────────────── - VERSION: v3.0 (Re-work) - COMPATIBLE WITH: PAPERMC / SPIGOT / BUKKIT - IN-GAME VERSIONS: 1.21 - 1.21.11
